title: About Me
paragraphs: I have a solid academic background in Instrumentation Physics and am an enthusiastic Software Engineer.

My physics training has given me a problem-solving mentality, and I like turning intricate concepts into scalable, dependable, and beautiful software solutions. I concentrate on creating top-notch systems that provide genuine business value, whether they are cloud-based architectures, web apps, or backend systems.

Every project I work on benefits from my special combination of accuracy, reasoning, and originality. Clean code, system performance optimization, security, and user-centered design are the guiding principles of my methodology.
